member.name: M:PFunP.Do.Generate``1(System.Func{``0})
member.summary: Returns an infinite sequence of items generated by the provided supplier function.
member.typeparam: The return type of the supplier function.
member.param: The function used to populate the sequence

member.name: M:PFunP.Do.Iterate``1(``0,System.Func{``0,``0})
member.summary: Returns an infinite sequence starting from a seed value to be accumulated.
member.typeparam: The type of the items of the sequence
member.param: The first item in the sequence the following ones will be originated from
A method that supplies the next value according to its argument

member.name: M:PFunP.Do.Repeat``1(``0)
member.summary: Returns an infinite sequence by repeating the provided value.
member.typeparam: The type of the repeated value.
member.param: The item to be repeated in the sequence

member.name: M:PFunP.Do.Scope``1(System.Func{``0})
member.summary: Defines a new local scope on which statements may be written in order to return a new value.
member.typeparam: The type of the value this local scope returns
member.param: A parameterless function that allows writting statements within an expression

member.name: M:PFunP.Do.To``1(``0,System.Action{``0})
member.summary: Takes a mutable object, mutates it with the provided mutator function and returns the mutated object.
member.typeparam: The type of the mutable object
member.param: A procedure that takes the mutable object

member.name: M:PFunP.Do.Until``1(``0,System.Func{``0,System.Boolean},System.Func{``0,``0})
member.summary: Emulates tail recursion. Accumulates the provided seed on loop; returns when the condition is true.
member.typeparam: The type of the initial value of this looping function
member.param: The value to be tested and accumulated; usually a tuple
The condition that controls the loop
A function to be applied to seed
member.returns: The result of accumulating the seed once the condition is true

member.name: T:PFunP.Func
member.summary: Defines common functions to be used as delegate instances.
